chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-6334 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s)  For orders as to non-prosecution (No one came up for compliance of office objections) 17.03.2026 None present ----------------- None present for the petitioner. Perusal of file reveals after filing this petition the petitioner has not complied with the office objection nor proceeded it vigilantly. It appears that either purpose for which this petition was filed, has been served, or the petitioner has lost her interest in the proceedings, therefore, she as well as her counsel have chosen to remain absent instead of pursuing it vigilantly. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in default. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
